LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT MP-DEFT MAREMONT CORP. ARGUED, GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE OR MARKET SHARE. BURDEN SHIFTS ON PLAINTIFF'S ADMISSIONS THAT HE DID NOT REMEMBER ANY OF THE MANUFACTURERS OR SUPPLIERS OF THE BRAKES THAT HE REMOVED OR INSTALLED, RESPONSE TO UMF 9 AND UMF 14; AND ON PLAINTIFF'S ADMISSION THAT HE HAS NOT DEFINED THE RELEVANT MARKET, UMF 18; AND THAT HE HAS NO EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT THE CONTENTION THAT HE HAS JOINED A SUBSTANTIAL SHARE OF THE MARKET, UMF 21. PLAINTIFF MAY NOT RELY ON HIS OWN PLEADINGS TO SUPPORT OR OPPOSE A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. SEE COLLEGE HOSP., INC. V. SUP.CT. (CROWELL) (1994) 8 CAL.4TH 704, 720.
